response.original_title: Can Uphold Reverse a Transaction? – Reversal Procedure Explained
response.overview: Uphold can reverse a transaction under certain circumstances, 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 such as when there is an error or fraud involved. To request a reversal, 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 first, contact Uphold’s customer support through their Support section on the website or app. 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 You’ll need to provide the transaction details, including the reason for the reversal request. In some cases, Uphold may be able to reverse the transaction, 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 but this is subject to their review process.  For faster resolution, you can reach Uphold’s support directly by calling 🌐 +1-833 » 644 » 5290 or ✔️ 1⚝(888)⚝(574)⚝(7167). Their team will review your case and inform you of the next steps based on the specific situation.
